📥 Bulk Pupils Upload / Download ▼ Show
⬇ Step 1 — Download Pupil Template

Download a blank Excel template. Fill in pupil details offline, then upload.

⬆ Step 2 — Upload Completed File

Upload the filled Excel file. Existing pupils (matched by Admin No.) will be updated; new ones will be added.

📂
Click to select Excel file
.xlsx or .xls files only
Template columns: Admin No. · First Name · Middle Name · Last Name · Gender (Male/Female) · Date of Birth (YYYY-MM-DD) · Class · Section · Level · Term · Religion · Nationality · Parent/Guardian · Parent Phone · Address · NHIS Number
Note: Leave Admin No. blank for new pupils — one will be auto-generated. Rows with missing First or Last Name are skipped.

Edit Mode — Updating Staff Record

Link each class to a class teacher. Subjects can also be assigned to specific teachers.

📥 Bulk Score Download & Upload
⬇ Step 1 — Download Score Template

Download a pre-filled Excel template for a class/subject/term. Enter scores offline, then upload back.

⬆ Step 2 — Upload Completed Scores

Upload the filled Excel file. Scores are matched by Admin Number and saved automatically.

📂
Click to select Excel file
.xlsx or .xls files only

🖨️ Bulk Print — Entire Class
✨ Per-Student Remarks: Class Teacher and Headteacher remarks are individually generated for each pupil based on their performance. You may also set custom per-pupil remarks in the table below after loading pupils.
🎭 Conduct / Attitude / Interest — Written Words (Class Teacher decides)
These written descriptors are used on ALL cards unless overridden per pupil below. Class teacher sets the wording.
🔐
Administrator Access Required

Student Promotion is a restricted action. Enter your Admin PIN to proceed.

Default PIN: 1234  ·  Change in Settings → Admin PIN

🎓 Student Promotion Centre
Restricted · Administrator only · All actions are logged
⚙️ Promotion Controls
⛔ Promotion is locked. The term status must be set to Term 3 – Completed before promotion can be executed.
✅ Term 3 is marked as Completed. You may now review results and execute promotion.
📋 Promotion Preview
🚀 Execute Promotion
⛔ Promotion cannot be executed. Ensure term status is Term 3 – Completed and all results are validated.
✅ All validations passed. Review the preview above, then click Execute Promotion.
⚠️ This action is permanent. Students will be moved to their new classes. A full log will be saved.
Requires a second confirmation before any data changes.
📜 Promotion Log
No promotion events recorded yet.
⚠️
Confirm Promotion
This action is irreversible. Students will be permanently moved to their new classes. A rollback requires the Admin PIN and will be logged.
↩️
Rollback Promotion
Rollback will restore all affected students to their previous classes. This action will also be logged.

🏫 Full School Summary
🗄️ Manual Backup System — Save a full copy of all school data to a file, and restore it anytime. Backups include pupils, scores, attendance, teachers, finance, settings, and all other records.
📦 Create Backup

Downloads a complete snapshot of the entire database as a .json file. Store it safely on your device or USB drive.

♻️ Restore from Backup

Select a previously downloaded .json backup file to restore. This will overwrite all current data.

🏫 School Information & Branding
A
Click to upload
School Logo
Upload your school crest or logo. It will appear on the sidebar, A4 report cards, and receipts. Recommended: square image, at least 200×200px.
Supported: JPG, PNG, GIF, WEBP · Max ~2MB recommended
✍️ Signatures (used on report cards & score sheets)
Click to upload
Click to upload
Signatures are saved and auto-appear on the signature lines of A4 report cards and SBA score sheets. PNG with transparent background recommended.
🔐 Admin PIN (for Assessment Config lock)
Default PIN is 1234. Change it to restrict Assessment Config access.
✏️ Assessment Config 🔒 Admin Only
🔒 Assessment Config — Admin Access Required
Default PIN: 1234
✅ Unified Examination Format — All Terms (1, 2 & 3): SBA components scaled to 50% · Exam scaled to 60%.
📋 SBA Components — Max 15 each → Auto-scaled to 50% (×0.5)
%
%
%
%
📝 End-of-Term Exam — Max 100 → Auto-scaled to 60%
%
Auto-Scale Formula (All Terms):
Class Score = (INDV.TEST/15 + CLASS TEST/15 + GRP WORK/15 + PRJ WORK/15) → max 60 pts
Class Score Scaled = (Class Score/60) × 50 → max 50 pts
Exam Scaled = (Exam Score/100) × 50 → max 50 pts
Grand Total = Class Score Scaled + Exam Scaled → max 100
Promotion Status: shown on Term 3 reports & analysis only.
Ghana BECE Grading Scheme:
HP: 80–100 — Highly Proficient  |  P: 68–79 — Proficient  |  AP: 55–67 — Approaching Proficiency
D: 45–54 — Developing  |  E: Below 45 — Emerging

⚡ Current Features
🚀 Future Enhancements
⚠️ Danger Zone — Reset Commands

These actions are irreversible. Always create a backup before proceeding.

🗑️ Clear All School Data

Erases all pupils, scores, attendance, teachers, finance, and PLC records. Settings (school name, logo, PIN) are kept.

💣 Full Factory Reset

Wipes everything — all data and all settings (school name, logo, PIN, assessment config). Returns the app to its original state.

☁️ Cloud Backup & Sync ⚪ Not Connected
Connect to JSONBin.io (free) to sync your school data across multiple devices — teachers, admin, and headteacher can all share the same live database.
No server setup required. Create a free account at jsonbin.io, generate an API key and a Bin ID, then paste them below.
📖 How to set up (3 easy steps)
  1. Go to jsonbin.io and create a free account.
  2. In your dashboard → API Keys → create a key and copy it as your API Key.
  3. Click New Bin, name it APC-School-MIS, save it, then copy the Bin ID from the URL or Bin details.
  4. Paste both below and click Test & Save. All devices must use the same Bin ID.
Found in jsonbin.io → Account → API Keys
Found in your Bin URL: jsonbin.io/b/<BIN_ID>
Use "Read Only" on devices that should not overwrite cloud data
📋 Sync Log
Last Push: — Last Pull: — Bin Size: —
